manCTMed: Session

Ivan Jacob Agaloos Pesigan

Source: vignettes/session/session.Rmd
session.Rmd
library(manCTMed)

Session 

sessionInfo()
#> R version 4.4.0 (2024-04-24)
#> Platform: x86_64-pc-linux-gnu
#> Running under: Ubuntu 22.04.4 LTS
#> 
#> Matrix products: default
